title: Enhanced Throwables
description: Makes throwables do sound on hit with configurable damage and cooldown to snowballs, eggs, splash potions(no dmg), and possibility to throw arrows from hand.
body:
Enhanced Throwables

A simple mod for modpack devs, that make snowballs, and eggs do corresponding sounds on hit, with configurable damage and cooldown, also ability to throw arrows from hand

Current items which you can throw:

  • arrows
  • apples and golden apples

Items with configurable cooldown:

  • same as above +
  • snowballs and eggs

Items with configurable damage:

  • snowballs and eggs
  • apples and golden apples

Coming Soon: slimeballs with slowness effect and other items
